label: AI compute → power → land/hosting

orientation.note: Hyperscaler capex and power/land constraints show high-gradient demand; water/surface optionality rides midstream.

interference.physics_note: Electric compute and grid power are physically permitted; density/efficiency still open doors vs brain/physics limits.
interference.economic_note: First-principles: power and land scarcity price into hosting and surface royalties.
interference.regulatory_note: Grid interconnect and environmental permits slow sites; transition risk, not terminal block.
interference.controlled_failures_note: Single project delay is entropic path noise, not theme falsification.

reinforcement.recursive_note: More AI demand → more capex → more power/land competition.

expected_value_note: Context only. Weight land/power optionality when orientation+reinforcement hold; do not auto-inflate Lawrence IRR.
